item.title: Investigating PowerShell: Command and Script Logging
item.description: Investigate Microsoft PowerShell and how it opens up capabilities for attackers & more cybersecurity tips & information on the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Are You More Interested in Stopping a Breach or Stopping Malware? - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Are You More Interested in Stopping a Breach or Stopping Malware? While the obvious answer should be both, what would you choose first? Learn more!

item.title: Using OS X FSEvents to Discover Deleted Malicious Artifact
item.description: Using the File System Events artifact CrowdStrike explains how it can help discover the existence of deleted malware files on their blog here.

item.title: Open Source Active Reconnaissance (Red Team)
item.description: Having visibility into an attacker's reconnaissance activities enables organizations to better protect themselves from a breach. Learn more here!

item.title: Reconnaissance Detection (Blue Team) - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Read up on the roles of a blue team in reconnaissance detection & the few things that can be done to counter activity in the early stages of attack!

item.title: Cyber Skirmish: Russia v. Turkey - crowdstrike.com
item.description: On the morning of 24 November 2015 an F-16 operated by the Turkish Air Force dropped into position behind a Russian Su-24 Fencer. Learn more!

item.title: Cyber Security Due-Diligence Questionnaire - CrowdStrike
item.description: With the value of mergers & acquisitions growing year after year, CrowdStrike has established a process to fully vet a target company’s systems, data, and environment to assess and protect those valuable assets being acquired.

item.title: Solving Intractable Performance Problems Through Vertical Engineering
item.description: Increased Security in Windows 10 Anniversary Update (Redstone) Through Dynamic Kernel Address Space Randomization of Page Table Structures.

item.title: State of the Criminal Address | CrowdStrike
item.description: Discovered attacks from criminal groups responsible for the delivery of NewPosThings, MalumPOS and PoSeidon point of sale Malware, as well as Carbanak.

item.title: CrowdResponse Release and new @Tasks modules - crowdstrike.com
item.description: With the ongoing need to effectively & quickly detect and respond to attacks, CrowdStrike is excited to release a new version of CrowdResponse. Learn more!

item.title: CrowdStrike evaluated in Gartner’s Comparison of Endpoint Detection and Response Technologies and Solutions
item.description: Gartner has recently published a comparative assessment called Comparison of Endpoint Detection and Response Technologies and Solutions.

item.title: Read Featured Research & Threat Intel Article by Adam Meyers
item.description: The eCrime actor’s operational profile differs greatly from that of an espionage-focused targeted intrusion actor.

item.title: Delivering HOT New Features | Crowdstrike
item.description: I often hear from Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) how hard their job is and how often they are in the ‘line of fire’ when bad things happen.

item.title: CrowdStrike Machine Learning and VirusTotal - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Over the past three months, CrowdStrike worked closely with VirusTotal (VT), and we are excited to announce the integration of our anti-malware technology.

item.title: Bear Hunting: Tracking Down COZY BEAR Backdoors
item.description: The recovery of the backdoor illuminates additional indicators organizations can leverage to further scope potential COZY BEAR activity in their networks.

item.title: Google Capital Bets Big on CrowdStrike to Accelerate Hyper-growth - crowdstrike.com
item.description: It was almost four years ago that I co-founded CrowdStrike with intention of creating a security company that would shake up the industry. Learn more now!

item.title: Falcon Zero-Day Flash Detection
item.description: In the wake of the Hacking Team leaks in early July, a result of an intrusion into the company’s network. Learn more about the intrusion today!

item.title: Brian Kelly, CSO of Rackspace, Shares Why He Chose CrowdStrike - crowdstrike.com
item.description: When you're in charge of protecting your company's and customers critical business information, there's no option for a security breach.

item.title: U.S. - China Cyber Agreement: Trust, but Verify - crowdstrike.com
item.description: For many years the security industry has been advocating for an agreement between 2 superpowers, do we finally have it? Read more on the CrowdStrike blog.

item.title: Blurring of Commodity and Targeted Attack Malware
item.description: As malware and its authors continue to evolve, deciphering the purpose of specific malware-driven attacks has become more challenging. Learn more now!

item.title: Sakula Malware: What Is the INOCNATION Campaign? – CrowdStrike
item.description: Read up on the third Sakula malware variant, how it was assessed, and how it was determined if there was a connection between the “French Aerospace” campaign, the “Ironman” campaign, and the "INOCNATION" campaign.

item.title: Nothing else is working. Why not memory forensics? - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Why memory forensics isn't the tool for central security & where it does belong. Click to learn more from the CrowdStrike blog!

item.title: Top 5 Cybersecurity Mistakes Companies Make and How to Avoid Them
item.description: Click to read the top five cybersecurity mistakes companies make and how to avoid them with these solutions on the CrowdStike blog here.

item.title: “You Want Me to Do What?” A Guide to Interpreting Cybersecurity Recommendations
item.description: Important information for you and your team that will help you identify the security gaps to help keep your company safe. Learn how to get protected today!

item.title: New Protection Capability of Falcon for Mac
item.description: A powerful solution to prevent threats? Read about CrowdStrike's new protection capability of Falcon for Mac here!

item.title: What Sets Falcon Apart: Intelligent Host Sensors
item.description: Learn what sets CrowdStrike's Falcon apart from other endpoint security competition with its intelligent host sensors & more here on our blog.

item.title: The Importance of Logging - CrowdStrike
item.description: Across the targeted attacks, thefts & criminal enterprises that CrowdStrike has investigated, one thing is clear: logging is extremely important, click here to learn more!

item.title: More Than Just Your eSignature: The Analysis - crowdstrike.com
item.description: Part two of CrowdStrike's investigation for a client operating in the healthcare sector on a phishing scam targeting cloud email providers, click to read!

item.title: The Security Roadmap – Planning for Job Security - crowdstrike.com
item.description: A common weakness we observe in organizations is the misuse of technology that has already been purchased, learn more on the CrowdStrike blog.

item.title: 4.0 Another Brick In The CryptoWall - crowdstrike.com
item.description: CrowdStrike will characterize the CryptoWall threat using the kill chain & outline practical approaches for disrupting it. See what's new with version 4.0!
